# uptimeNanoseconds

**Instance Property**

Returns the number of nanoseconds since boot, excluding any time the system spent asleep.

## Declaration

```swift
var uptimeNanoseconds: UInt64 { get }
```

## Getting the Time

- **rawValue**: Returns the underlying time value.
